description: §15.10 — a required prop omitted at the call site SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-010. `Badge` declares two required props (`label`, `status`); the use site `<Badge label="Inbox"/>` omits `status`. Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-010 pin; clean neg is components/missing-required-prop-clean.
rationale: §15.10: 'Props declared in the props block are required by default. A required prop that is absent at the call site SHALL be a compile error (E-COMPONENT-010).' `status` has no `?` and no default, so omitting it at the call site is a hard error.
